Vision, Mission, Guiding Principles
Fresno County Emergency Information
Code Enforcement
Code Enforcement responds and investigates complaints regarding the Fresno County Zoning Ordinance and the Ordinance Code. Our goal is to achieve voluntary compliance through increasing awareness and education about the importance in maintaining and improving property values within Fresno County. When necessary, we utilize legal procedures to ensure compliance and remedy violations.
What is
Fresno County
Code Enforcement?
Fresno County Code Enforcement is dedicated to improving the quality of life for the people who live and work within the unincorporated area of the County.
Code Enforcement responds and investigates complaints regarding the Fresno County Zoning Ordinance and the Ordinance Code. Our goal is to achieve voluntary compliance through increasing awareness and education about the importance in maintaining and improving property values within Fresno County. When necessary, we utilize legal procedures to ensure compliance and remedy violations.
County Ordinance Enforcement
How You Can Help
Community involvement plays a vital role in maintaining safe, clean, and thriving neighborhoods. By staying informed about local ordinances and being proactive, you help protect property values and improve the quality of life for everyone. Your awareness and participation make a significant impact in ensuring that our community remains a great place to live.
Maintain Property Cleanliness
Keep all property free of trash, debris and overgrown, dead or unmanaged landscaping
Secure Vacant Properties
Fence or secure properties that might attract trespassers or vandals
Maintain Clean Grounds
Keep grounds and structures clean and tidy
Discourage Illicit Activity
Do not tolerate illicit activity
Make a Report
Report violations and nuisances
Why It Matters
Help improve the quality of life, the appearance of our neighborhoods and our local businesses
Protect health and safety
Help maintain property values
Prevent the physical and aesthetic deterioration of our community
Enhance, maintain, and develop business districts to foster economic growth
How Can We Help?
